The '''Eye of the [[Albino Cyclops]]''' was a mythical artifact of the [[Skakoan religion]].

==History==
The Eye was said to be hidden in the [[Gates of Grontessiant]]. It was guarded by the [[Four See Seers of the Cyclops]] and the [[Lord Being of the Swirblies]].

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Wat Tambor and the Quest for the Sacred Eye of the Albino Cyclops|book=Star Wars: Visionaries}}
